offer: HVAC missed-call recovery concierge for local service owners
access_type: warm owner access through a family member

primary_channel.name: warm family introductions
primary_channel.why: Trust and relevance matter more than reach for a service offer sold to local HVAC owners.

segments: shops with meaningful inbound call volume

offer_framing: recover revenue from calls already generated
book more jobs without adding front-desk headcount
improve speed-to-lead on missed inbound calls

channel_plan.purpose: validate pain, call volume, and fit
make the next step easy and concrete
turn warm conversations into more warm conversations

recommended_sequence: build a prioritized list of warm-reachable owners
request 5-10 permission-based intros from the family member
reply to each intro quickly with a low-friction 15-minute ask
run discovery calls to confirm pain and estimate missed-call value
follow up by text on day 2 and day 7
key_recommendations: position the service around recovered revenue and speed-to-lead
sell a short pilot instead of a long-term commitment
use text as the main follow-up channel for owners
